summary: Layered voice notes that paint themselves Discussion | Link
content: Tide turns voice memos into layered sound sketches. Takes stack onto one tape — hum a bassline, beatbox over it, sing the hook. The waveform paints itself as you record. Scrub like vinyl, loop the good part, send it to Choppa or your DAW. No subs, no cloud. Launch month — 50% off until the end of July!
chineseSummary: 分层语音笔记描绘自己 讨论 |关联
chineseContent: Tide 将语音备忘录变成分层的声音草图。将堆栈放在一盘磁带上——哼着贝斯线，在上面唱节奏，唱副歌。波形会在您录制时自行绘制。像黑胶唱片一样擦洗，循环好的部分，将其发送到 Choppa 或您的 DAW。没有潜艇，没有云。发布月份 — 7 月底前可享受 50% 折扣！
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
